changeSet.author: nexus-jxizy.10.1
changeSet.comment: The landing schema — width-free by design (RDR-180 land-then-transform)
changeSet.sql: CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS staging;
changeSet.rollback: DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS staging CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-jxizy.10.1
changeSet.comment: ONE polymorphic staged-chunk table: legacy_ref carries ANY id width verbatim; collection is the HONEST target name (land-time classification, reconciliation H1); dim is a VALUE (promote routes by it and asserts it against the name-implied dim); embedding is UNTYPED vector (mixed dims legal, no ANN index — never searched)
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE staging.chunks ( tenant_id TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', collection TEXT NOT NULL, dim INTEGER NOT NULL, legacy_ref TEXT NOT NULL, chunk_text TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', embedding vector, model TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', chunk_meta JSONB, landed_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT staging_chunks_pk PRIMARY KEY (tenant_id, collection, legacy_ref) ); ALTER TABLE staging.chunks ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; ALTER TABLE staging.chunks FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON staging.chunks USING (tenant_id = current_setting('nexus.tenant', true)) WITH CHECK (tenant_id = current_setting('nexus.tenant', true));

changeSet.author: nexus-jxizy.10.1
changeSet.comment: Width-free TEXT siblings mirroring the SOURCE shapes verbatim — the remap_cascade CASCADE_STORES inventory (document_chunks manifest, chash_index, topic_assignments, frecency, relevance_log, document_aspects, aspect_extraction_queue). Timestamps land as TEXT (verbatim); promote/finalize parse as needed. Every table: FORCE RLS + tenant policy identical to the nexus tables

changeSet.author: nexus-jxizy.10.1
changeSet.comment: nexus_svc drives land/promote/finalize/clear under withTenant — needs full DML + TRUNCATE on staging (runAlways: self-healing like grants-nexus-svc)
changeSet.sql: GRANT USAGE ON SCHEMA staging TO nexus_svc; GRANT SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, TRUNCATE ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA staging TO nexus_svc;
changeSet.rollback: REVOKE ALL ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA staging FROM nexus_svc; REVOKE USAGE ON SCHEMA staging FROM nexus_svc;
